data.title: Stoner's Pizza Joint Launches New "Pesto Paradise" Pizza for a Limited Time
data.description: From May 4 to June 28, Stoner's Pizza Joint is introducing a new limited-time item, the Pesto Paradise Pizza, across the country. Based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Florida, the pizza chain is aiming to add bold, fresh flavors to their menu. The nationwide release of this specialty pizza will run for nearly two months, marking a significant addition to their offerings.

data.title: Holladay Distillery | McCormick Distilling Co. Announce Distribution Agreement with Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits
data.description: In Weston, Missouri, on May 1, 2026, Holladay Distillery revealed a fresh partnership with Southern Glazer's for multi-state distribution, amplifying its presence in vital U.S. markets. Starting on the same date, Southern Glazer's will take on distribution duties for Holladay Distillery.

data.title: Buona Beef Kicks Off "Beef Month" with World Beef Championship, Limited-Edition Merch, Member-Only Deals, and an Italian Beef Day Special
data.description: In May 2026, the original Italian Beef brand in Chicago is celebrating National Beef Month by paying homage to its signature sandwich. Buona, a renowned family-owned brand, is intensifying its focus on their specialty during this month.

data.title: Middleburg Secures Land and Construction Financing for Mosby Northlake in Charlotte
data.description: In Vienna, Virginia, Middleburg has successfully obtained the funding for the development of Mosby Northlake, a 312-unit residential complex located in the Northlake/Huntersville area of North Charlotte. Construction is set to commence this spring, and the initial units are expected to be ready for occupancy by October 2027. The decision to move forward with this project aligns with the increasing housing needs in Charlotte, as the city is experiencing a shortage in available housing. Charlotte, also known as the Queen City, was the recipient of the second-highest number of new jobs in the United States in 2025, with New York City being the only city ahead in job growth.

data.title: Researchers from Incheon National University Spotlight Next-Generation EV Diagnostics
data.description: Cutting-edge single-vesicle tools have been developed in Incheon, South Korea, providing improved diagnostic capabilities and disease monitoring. Released on May 1, 2026, a study by Incheon National University researchers highlights the potential for earlier diagnoses, more precise disease tracking, and personalized treatment strategies. This innovative technology offers promising advancements in healthcare with the ability to revolutionize medical interventions.

data.title: Gardiner Acquires IntelliTech Fire & Security, Inc.
data.description: A top building solutions provider in Northern Ohio, Gardiner Service Company, has expanded its fire and life safety services with the recent acquisition of IntelliTech Fire & Security in Medina. The company, known for HVAC and building technology solutions, made the announcement on May 1, 2026. This move signifies Gardiner Service Company's commitment to enhancing its offerings in the region.

data.title: Cellular Glutathione Shines During Stress Awareness Month
data.description: In the effort to address oxidative stress at a cellular level, there is a promising health approach highlighted during Stress Awareness Month in April. Taking place in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on May 1, 2026, this initiative focuses on understanding and managing stress. By emphasizing the importance of combatting oxidative stress within cells, individuals are encouraged to explore effective strategies for improving health. This innovative approach aims to raise awareness about the significance of addressing oxidative stress, offering promising solutions amid a month dedicated to stress management.

data.title: EssayPay Launches the Easiest Referral Program
data.description: EssayPay, a reputable essay writing service based in DOVER, Del., has recently launched a straightforward referral program on May 1, 2026. Users are now able to earn 10% for every friend they refer by simply sharing a unique referral link. This program offers one of the easiest ways to accumulate referral money.

data.title: Annex Brands Expands National Footprint Overnight with Acquisition of Postal Connections Business Service Centers
data.description: Annex Brands, Inc., a prominent franchisor specializing in packing, shipping, and office services, has successfully acquired Postal Connections of America. This deal involves the purchase of 34 Postal Connections packaging and shipping franchises. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for Annex Brands as it expands its presence in the industry. The transaction, finalized on May 1, 2026, further solidifies Annex Brands' position as a key player in the franchising sector.

data.title: Have your mullet and eat it too. McCann New Zealand and McDonald's turns online trend into reality with the Mulleted cheeseburger
data.description: The unique creation of a cheeseburger with a mullet hairstyle has recently been unveiled in New Zealand. Referred to as the McMullet by enthusiastic fans, this culinary innovation marks a trend of blending social media trends with real-world experiences. Following in the footsteps of Canada's McLobster and Mexico's McMolletes, the McMullet has taken the spotlight, debuting in Auckland, New Zealand on May 1, 2026. This quirky burger has quickly gained attention, with numerous social media posts documenting its arrival and generating buzz among food enthusiasts.

data.title: Voya Financial Welcomes Executive Order Promoting Retirement-Savings Access for American Workers
data.description: In New York, Voya Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VOYA), a prominent retirement, employee benefits, and investment management firm, has positively responded to an executive order aimed at enhancing retirement savings access for countless Americans facing limited options. The order instructs the U.S. Treasury Department to create a new platform showcasing top-tier, affordable, privately-run IRAs. Voya Financial views this directive as a significant advancement in widening opportunities for retirement savings.

data.title: National Healthcare Properties Announces Release Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In New York on May 01, 2026, National Healthcare Properties, Inc. (Nasdaq: NHP) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, post-market closure on Wednesday, May 13, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $77,000, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Bump 1%
data.description: Bitcoin reached a trading value exceeding $77,000 on Friday morning, with Bitcoin ETFs witnessing $14.8 million in net inflows on Thursday. Conversely, Ethereum ETFs experienced a net outflow of $23.6 million. The current prices for popular cryptocurrencies are: Bitcoin at $77,805, Ethereum at $2,305, Solana at $84.38, XRP at $1.39, Dogecoin at $0.1081, and Shiba Inu at $0.056303. The meme coin market capitalization has risen by 1.3% to $36.6 billion in the last 24 hours. Analyst Michael van de Poppe noted that Bitcoin commonly starts the month strongly, buoyed by ETF investments. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: She Does Everything for Everyone -- This Mother's Day, Give Her the One Thing She Actually Needs
data.description: The Floatation Tank Association, a float therapy industry group, aims to provide the science-supported benefits of floating to all mothers. A press release from SAN DIEGO on May 1, 2026, highlights this mission. The association emphasizes the importance of moms experiencing the benefits of floating, which includes managing stress and promoting relaxation.

data.title: Kari Curletto Crowned Winner of the Charm Weddings Toilet Paper Derby Hat Contest Presented by Ripley's Believe It or Not!
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, on May 1, 2026, CharmWeddings.com, known for the successful Toilet Paper Wedding Dress Contest, revealed the champions of the inaugural Toilet Paper Derby Hat Contest. This unique event blended DIY Toilet Paper Fashion with Kentucky Derby aesthetics, marking a new trend in creative competitions.

data.title: Fine Example of an 1806/5 Bust Half Dollar Coin Earns a $67,650 Payday at Morphy's $1.2M Premier Coins Auction
data.description: In Denver on May 1, 2026, several noteworthy coins were auctioned off for significant prices. Among them, an 1879-CC Morgan Dollar, graded MS65 PCGS, sold for $33,210. The auction also featured a 1798/7 overdate $10 Capped Bust Heraldic Eagle going for $32,595, and an 1856-S Liberty Head $20 gold Double Eagle fetching $23,370. One particular highlight was an 1806/5 Bust Half Dollar coin of the Overton-103a variety.

data.title: 10 Years. 1 Million Meals. Twin Cities Community Rallies for Feed My Starving Children's Pack at the Park
data.description: Registration for volunteers is now available for an event taking place on June 10 - 11 at Target Field. The non-profit organization is aiming to recruit 3,000 community members to assist in reaching the next milestone.
